fa-cassette-tape.appearanceId: rectangular cassette body with two circular reels visible through a cutout window and a row of small holes along the bottom edge; audio tape cartridge outline with dual spool openings
fa-cassette-tape.functionalityId: plays or manages a recorded audio tape; opens a retro or archival audio playback feature
fa-cassette-tape.intentId: access or play a cassette tape recording; work with legacy or nostalgic audio media

fa-castle.appearanceId: stone fortress silhouette with multiple towers, crenellated battlements, and an arched gatehouse entry; medieval fortification outline with turrets and parapets
fa-castle.functionalityId: navigates to a castle, fortress, or medieval landmark on a map; represents a heritage or history-related category
fa-castle.intentId: explore or locate a castle or historic fortification; access medieval history or heritage content

fa-cat.appearanceId: sitting or walking cat silhouette with pointed ears, a curved tail, and whisker lines; feline animal profile outline
fa-cat.functionalityId: tags content as cat-related or pet-friendly; filters results by feline or small-animal category
fa-cat.intentId: find or manage cat or pet-related content; represent a feline animal in a listing or profile

fa-cat-space.appearanceId: cat silhouette wearing a rounded astronaut helmet or space suit; feline outline with a circular visor and space gear
fa-cat-space.functionalityId: represents a playful or themed space-cat category; activates a novelty or fun themed feature
fa-cat-space.intentId: access whimsical or space-themed content; indicate a fun or novelty pet-and-space category

fa-cauldron.appearanceId: round-bellied pot with two side handles sitting on three stubby legs, with wavy lines indicating steam or liquid; large hemispherical cooking vessel outline
fa-cauldron.functionalityId: indicates a brewing, cooking, or crafting action; opens a recipe or potion-mixing feature
fa-cauldron.intentId: brew a potion, cook a recipe, or access a crafting feature; represent a mixing or concoction process

fa-cctv.appearanceId: dome or box-shaped camera body mounted on a bracket arm with a lens protruding forward; surveillance camera silhouette on a wall-mount support
fa-cctv.functionalityId: opens a security camera feed or CCTV monitoring view; manages surveillance camera settings
fa-cctv.intentId: monitor a space via security camera; access or review CCTV footage

fa-cedi-sign.appearanceId: uppercase letter C with two horizontal parallel lines crossing through its center; currency symbol with double-stroke through a curved letter
fa-cedi-sign.functionalityId: inserts or displays the Ghanaian cedi currency symbol; labels a monetary value in cedis
fa-cedi-sign.intentId: represent a price or amount in Ghanaian cedis; format a financial value in the cedi currency

fa-cent-sign.appearanceId: lowercase letter c with a single vertical line crossing through its center from top to bottom; cent currency symbol with a vertical stroke
fa-cent-sign.functionalityId: inserts or displays the cent currency symbol; labels a small monetary denomination in cents
fa-cent-sign.intentId: represent a price or amount in cents; format a financial value as a fractional currency unit

fa-certificate.appearanceId: starburst or multi-pointed radial badge shape with jagged or scalloped outer edges; award seal outline with many short radiating points
fa-certificate.functionalityId: indicates a certification, badge, or verified status; marks content as officially certified or awarded
fa-certificate.intentId: view or share a certificate or credential; indicate official verification or award status

fa-chair.appearanceId: side-profile dining or standard chair with a backrest, seat, and four legs; simple seating furniture silhouette
fa-chair.functionalityId: indicates a seating or furniture item in a listing; marks a chair product or room furnishing option
fa-chair.intentId: select or view a chair or seating item; browse furniture or interior design options

fa-chair-office.appearanceId: side-profile office chair with a high backrest, armrests, a seat cushion, and a wheeled base pedestal; ergonomic swivel chair silhouette
fa-chair-office.functionalityId: indicates an office chair or ergonomic seating product; marks a workstation furniture item
fa-chair-office.intentId: select or configure an office chair; browse ergonomic or workplace seating options

fa-chalkboard-user.appearanceId: rectangular board with a person silhouette standing in front of or beside it; presentation board with a human figure overlay
fa-chalkboard-user.functionalityId: opens a teaching, training, or instructor-led session; navigates to a classroom or lesson management view
fa-chalkboard-user.intentId: access an instructional or teaching session; manage a class or learning presentation

fa-champagne-glass.appearanceId: tall flute glass with a long narrow stem, a small flat base, and a slender elongated bowl; champagne or sparkling wine glass silhouette
fa-champagne-glass.functionalityId: marks a celebratory event, toast, or special occasion; filters content related to parties or celebrations
fa-champagne-glass.intentId: celebrate an event or milestone; find or tag party or celebration content

fa-charging-station.appearanceId: upright rectangular kiosk or cabinet with a power plug or connector symbol on its face; electric vehicle charging station silhouette with a cable or plug icon
fa-charging-station.functionalityId: locates a nearby electric vehicle charging station; opens EV charging status or management settings
fa-charging-station.intentId: find or navigate to an EV charging point; monitor or manage electric vehicle charging

fa-chart-bullet.appearanceId: horizontal stacked bar segments of varying lengths with a thin vertical marker line overlaid; layered horizontal bars with a target indicator stroke
fa-chart-bullet.functionalityId: displays a bullet chart comparing a measure against a target; shows performance progress relative to a goal
fa-chart-bullet.intentId: compare actual versus target performance metrics; visualize progress toward a quantitative goal

fa-chart-candlestick.appearanceId: vertical rectangles of different heights with thin lines extending from their tops and bottoms arranged in a row; candlestick OHLC chart columns with wicks
fa-chart-candlestick.functionalityId: displays candlestick price data for a financial instrument; shows open, high, low, and close values over time
fa-chart-candlestick.intentId: analyze price movement of a stock or asset; review trading data in candlestick format

fa-chart-column.appearanceId: several vertical rectangular bars of varying heights rising from a horizontal baseline; standard column bar chart silhouette
fa-chart-column.functionalityId: displays data as a vertical bar chart; shows comparative values across categories
fa-chart-column.intentId: visualize and compare categorical data values; review a bar chart summary of metrics

fa-chart-diagram.appearanceId: nodes connected by lines in a flowchart or network diagram layout; boxes or circles linked with directional arrows
fa-chart-diagram.functionalityId: opens a diagram or flowchart builder; displays a structured node-and-edge relationship chart
fa-chart-diagram.intentId: map out a process flow or system architecture; create or view a diagram of connected elements

fa-chart-fft.appearanceId: series of vertical spikes or narrow bars of varying heights on a frequency axis baseline; spectral frequency domain signal plot
fa-chart-fft.functionalityId: displays a Fast Fourier Transform frequency spectrum chart; visualizes signal frequency components
fa-chart-fft.intentId: analyze frequency content of a signal; review spectral data in an FFT visualization

fa-chart-gantt.appearanceId: horizontal bars of varying lengths arranged in staggered rows on a timeline grid; project schedule bar chart with rows and time columns
fa-chart-gantt.functionalityId: displays a Gantt project timeline with task durations; shows task scheduling and dependencies over time
fa-chart-gantt.intentId: plan or review a project schedule and task timeline; manage project phases and deadlines

fa-chart-kanban.appearanceId: vertical columns each containing small stacked rectangular cards of varying heights; kanban board layout with column lanes and task card blocks
fa-chart-kanban.functionalityId: displays a kanban board with task cards in status columns; organizes work items by workflow stage
fa-chart-kanban.intentId: manage tasks visually across workflow stages; track work-in-progress on a kanban board

fa-chart-line.appearanceId: jagged or curved line connecting data points plotted on an x-y axis grid; single-line time series graph
fa-chart-line.functionalityId: displays data as a line chart over time; shows trends and changes across a continuous series
fa-chart-line.intentId: track a metric trend over time; review a time-series or trend line chart

fa-chart-line-down.appearanceId: descending line connecting data points trending downward from left to right on an axis; line chart with a negative slope
fa-chart-line-down.functionalityId: displays a declining trend line chart; shows a metric decreasing over time
fa-chart-line-down.intentId: review a downward trend or decline in data; track a falling metric over a time period

fa-chart-line-up.appearanceId: ascending line connecting data points trending upward from left to right on an axis; line chart with a positive slope
fa-chart-line-up.functionalityId: displays a rising trend line chart; shows a metric increasing over time
fa-chart-line-up.intentId: review an upward trend or growth in data; track an improving metric over a time period

fa-chart-line-up-down.appearanceId: zigzag line with both upward and downward segments plotted on an axis; fluctuating line chart with mixed positive and negative slopes
fa-chart-line-up-down.functionalityId: displays a volatile or mixed-direction trend line chart; shows a metric with both rises and falls over time
fa-chart-line-up-down.intentId: analyze a fluctuating or volatile data trend; review mixed-direction changes in a metric

fa-chart-mixed-up-circle-currency.appearanceId: combination chart with bar columns and a line overlaid, with a small circle badge showing a generic currency symbol; mixed bar-and-line chart with a currency indicator
fa-chart-mixed-up-circle-currency.functionalityId: displays a mixed chart combining bars and a trend line with a currency context; shows financial performance across multiple chart types
fa-chart-mixed-up-circle-currency.intentId: analyze financial data combining bar and line visualizations; review revenue or cost metrics in a mixed chart

fa-chart-mixed-up-circle-dollar.appearanceId: combination chart with bar columns and a line overlaid, with a small circle badge showing a dollar sign; mixed bar-and-line chart with a dollar currency indicator
fa-chart-mixed-up-circle-dollar.functionalityId: displays a mixed chart combining bars and a trend line in USD context; shows dollar-denominated performance across multiple chart types
fa-chart-mixed-up-circle-dollar.intentId: analyze dollar-value financial data in a combined bar-and-line chart; review USD revenue or budget metrics

fa-chart-network.appearanceId: multiple nodes depicted as circles connected by lines in a web-like graph layout; network graph with nodes and edges radiating outward
fa-chart-network.functionalityId: displays a network relationship or graph chart; visualizes connections between entities or nodes
fa-chart-network.intentId: explore relationships and connections in a data network; analyze a graph of linked entities

fa-chart-pie.appearanceId: full circle divided into wedge-shaped segments of varying sizes; standard pie chart with a visible slice boundary
fa-chart-pie.functionalityId: displays data as a pie chart; shows proportional breakdown of values across categories
fa-chart-pie.intentId: understand relative proportions of categories; review a pie chart distribution of data

fa-chart-pie-alt.appearanceId: circle divided into segments with one slice pulled out or offset from the main body; exploded pie chart with a detached wedge
fa-chart-pie-alt.functionalityId: displays an exploded pie chart with a highlighted segment; emphasizes one slice of a proportional breakdown
fa-chart-pie-alt.intentId: highlight a specific category in a pie chart; draw attention to one segment of a data distribution

fa-chart-pie-simple-circle-currency.appearanceId: simplified pie chart circle divided into two or three wedges with a small circle badge showing a generic currency symbol; minimal pie chart with a currency indicator badge
fa-chart-pie-simple-circle-currency.functionalityId: displays a simplified pie chart with a currency context indicator; shows a basic proportional breakdown of financial values
fa-chart-pie-simple-circle-currency.intentId: review a high-level financial proportion chart; understand currency-based share distribution at a glance

fa-chart-pie-simple-circle-dollar.appearanceId: simplified pie chart circle divided into two or three wedges with a small circle badge showing a dollar sign; minimal pie chart with a dollar currency badge
fa-chart-pie-simple-circle-dollar.functionalityId: displays a simplified pie chart with a dollar currency indicator; shows a basic proportional breakdown of USD values
fa-chart-pie-simple-circle-dollar.intentId: review a high-level dollar-value proportion chart; understand USD share distribution at a glance

fa-chart-pyramid.appearanceId: stacked horizontal bars decreasing in width from bottom to top forming a triangular pyramid shape; layered pyramid or funnel chart tapering upward
fa-chart-pyramid.functionalityId: displays data as a pyramid chart with hierarchical layers; shows proportional distribution across ranked tiers
fa-chart-pyramid.intentId: visualize a hierarchical breakdown or population pyramid; review tier-based data distribution

fa-chart-radar.appearanceId: polygon with multiple vertices connected by lines forming a web or spider shape on a radial axis grid; radar or spider chart outline with concentric polygonal rings
fa-chart-radar.functionalityId: displays data as a radar or spider chart across multiple axes; compares multivariate values on a radial grid
fa-chart-radar.intentId: compare performance across multiple dimensions simultaneously; review a multi-axis radar chart of attributes

fa-chart-scatter.appearanceId: small dots or points scattered across an x-y plane without connecting lines; scatter plot with individual data point markers
fa-chart-scatter.functionalityId: displays data as a scatter plot showing point distribution; reveals correlation or clustering between two variables
fa-chart-scatter.intentId: explore the relationship or correlation between two variables; analyze data point distribution in a scatter chart

fa-chart-scatter-3d.appearanceId: small dots distributed in a three-dimensional perspective space with x, y, and z axes suggested; 3D scatter plot with points in a cubic grid
fa-chart-scatter-3d.functionalityId: displays data as a three-dimensional scatter plot; shows distribution and correlation across three variables
fa-chart-scatter-3d.intentId: explore relationships across three data dimensions; analyze a 3D point cloud visualization

fa-chart-scatter-bubble.appearanceId: circles of varying sizes scattered across an x-y plane, where circle diameter encodes a third value; bubble chart with sized circular markers at plotted positions
fa-chart-scatter-bubble.functionalityId: displays data as a bubble chart with size-encoded third variable; shows relationships across three dimensions using sized circles
fa-chart-scatter-bubble.intentId: compare three variables simultaneously in a bubble chart; analyze data where size represents a quantitative dimension

fa-chart-simple.appearanceId: two or three vertical bars of different heights side by side on a baseline; minimal column bar chart silhouette
fa-chart-simple.functionalityId: displays data as a simple bar chart; shows a quick visual comparison of values
fa-chart-simple.intentId: get a quick overview of comparative data; view a basic bar chart summary

fa-chart-simple-horizontal.appearanceId: two or three horizontal bars of different lengths stacked on a vertical baseline; minimal horizontal bar chart silhouette
fa-chart-simple-horizontal.functionalityId: displays data as a simple horizontal bar chart; shows a quick visual comparison of values along a horizontal axis
fa-chart-simple-horizontal.intentId: compare category values in a horizontal bar chart; view a basic sideways bar chart summary

fa-chart-sine.appearanceId: smooth S-shaped wave curve oscillating above and below a horizontal center line; sinusoidal waveform line on an axis
fa-chart-sine.functionalityId: displays a sine wave or oscillating signal chart; visualizes a periodic or waveform data series
fa-chart-sine.intentId: analyze a periodic signal or oscillation pattern; visualize wave-based or cyclic data

fa-chart-tree-map.appearanceId: large rectangle subdivided into nested smaller rectangles of varying proportional sizes filling the entire area; treemap grid of proportionally sized nested cells
fa-chart-tree-map.functionalityId: displays data as a treemap with nested proportional rectangles; shows hierarchical part-to-whole relationships
fa-chart-tree-map.intentId: explore hierarchical data proportions in a treemap view; review nested category sizes at a glance

fa-chart-user.appearanceId: bar or line chart combined with a small person silhouette figure overlay; data chart with a user or person indicator badge
fa-chart-user.functionalityId: displays user analytics or per-person metrics in a chart; shows data visualizations tied to user activity
fa-chart-user.intentId: review analytics or performance data for a specific user; access user-level reporting charts

fa-chart-waterfall.appearanceId: series of vertical bars alternating above and below a floating baseline, with connector lines linking the bar tops; waterfall chart columns stepping up and down from a running total
fa-chart-waterfall.functionalityId: displays a waterfall chart showing cumulative running totals; visualizes incremental positive and negative contributions
fa-chart-waterfall.intentId: analyze how individual factors contribute to a cumulative total; review a breakdown of gains and losses in a waterfall chart

fa-check.appearanceId: simple diagonal checkmark stroke angled upward from left to right with a short left leg and longer right stroke; plain tick mark shape
fa-check.functionalityId: confirms or marks an item as complete or selected; toggles a task or option to a done state
fa-check.intentId: mark a task or item as completed; confirm a selection or approval

fa-check-circle.appearanceId: checkmark enclosed inside a full circle border; tick mark centered within a circular outline
fa-check-circle.functionalityId: confirms a successful action or verified state; marks an item as approved or complete within a circular badge
fa-check-circle.intentId: indicate successful completion or approval with a circular badge; confirm a verified or done status

fa-check-double.appearanceId: two overlapping checkmark strokes side by side creating a double tick; pair of diagonal check strokes layered together
fa-check-double.functionalityId: indicates a double-confirmed or read receipt status; marks content as verified or delivered twice
fa-check-double.intentId: confirm that a message was read or an action was double-verified; indicate a delivered and seen receipt

fa-check-square.appearanceId: checkmark enclosed inside a square border; tick mark centered within a rectangular outline
fa-check-square.functionalityId: toggles a checkbox to its checked or selected state; confirms an option or list item within a square form control
fa-check-square.intentId: select or confirm a checkbox option; mark a form field or list item as chosen

fa-cheese.appearanceId: wedge-shaped triangle of cheese with circular holes scattered across its surface; triangular dairy block silhouette with Swiss-style round cutouts
fa-cheese.functionalityId: tags food content as dairy or cheese-related; labels a recipe or menu item as containing cheese
fa-cheese.intentId: find or categorize cheese or dairy content; represent a cheese item in a food or recipe listing
